name: British GT Championship
summary: The UK's premier sportscar series for GT3 and GT4 machinery.

name: British Touring Car Championship
summary: Britain's biggest domestic racing series — door-to-door touring car action.

name: British F4 Championship
summary: The first step on the single-seater ladder for future stars, supporting the BTCC.

name: British Superbike Championship
summary: The world's most competitive domestic motorcycle racing championship.

name: British Rally Championship
summary: The UK's premier rally series, run on closed-road and forest stages.

name: 5 Nations British Rallycross Championship
summary: Mixed-surface, short, explosive racing at the UK and Ireland's rallycross venues.

name: British Hillclimb Championship
summary: Single cars against the clock on the UK's historic hill climb courses.

name: Straightliners
summary: A travelling event host running drag racing, top-speed and land-speed events at airfields, drag strips and beaches across the UK — from Melbourne Raceway to Pendine Sands.

name: BriSCA F1 Stock Cars
summary: The UK's premier stock car formula — contact racing on shale and tarmac ovals, culminating in the World Final.

name: Venue Event
summary: Events published on the venue's own calendar — race meetings, festivals and shows. Each carries its own race-type colour.

name: Santa Pod Raceway Events
summary: Drag racing and motorsport festivals at Santa Pod — from 300 mph FIA European championship rounds to Bug Jam.
